name: MISRA C: Undecidable Guideline Manually Reviewed
description: Potential violations of undecidable guidelines (not fully checkable by static analysis) are subject to manual review.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020 / guideline decidability: undecidable rules cannot be fully checked by a tool, so manual review is required to confirm compliance.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C:2012. https://misra.org.uk/
